articles.description: Less than a year ago, Mohamed Salah was sitting on a throne inside Anfield after renewing his contract - so why is he leaving?

articles.description: BBC Sport explores the rise in the cost of kits for the 2026 World Cup, with insights from experts and fans.
articles.title: World Cup kit prices: Has cost of jerseys gone too far?

articles.description: Spain have two of the world's best midfielders in Rodri and Martin Zubimendi, but can they play together?
articles.title: Rodri v Martin Zubimendi - the battle for a Spain spot

articles.description: Coco Gauff becomes the youngest American to reach the women's singles semi-finals at the Miami Open since Serena Williams in 2004.
articles.title: Miami Open: Coco Gauff reaches semi-finals for first time

articles.description: Fernando Alonso is to miss Thursday's media day at the Japanese Grand Prix because he is traveling to the race late following the birth of his first child.

articles.description: Tiger Woods says he is "trying to play" at next month's Masters after returning to action for the first time in more than a year in the TGL.

articles.description: Following the death of Ricky Hatton, families and former champions tell a new BBC documentary the sport has not filled the void in care for its fighters.
articles.title: Boxing: What can be done to help boxers' welfare during and after their careers?

articles.description: Chelsea manager Sonia Bompastor says the women's game needs "more respect" after her side have a goal controversially disallowed in their Women's Champions League quarter-final first leg against Arsenal.
articles.title: Arsenal 3-1 Chelsea: Women's game needs more respect with officiating - Sonia Bompastor

articles.description: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team explains which countries can still qualify for the World Cup via the European play-offs and intercontinental play-offs.
